title: Arachnothryx izabalensis
taxonomy: Arachnothryx izabalensis is classified within the family Rubiaceae, which is a large family of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. The genus Arachnothryx is a small group of flowering plants native to the Americas. Members of the genus Arachnothryx are shrubs or small trees with small, fragrant flowers. The classification of Arachnothryx izabalensis also places it within the order Gentianales, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The specific classification of Arachnothryx izabalensis is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Gentianales, Family: Rubiaceae, Genus: Arachnothryx, Species: A. izabalensis.
